violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine in the litchen noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Cutting boards noted not in good repair
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single use food containers and cup lids noted being stored on the floor.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls ceiling ceiling lights and ceiling vents in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin cooler and walkin cooler door noted not in good repair.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in food storage area walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Cutting boards ladles and spatulas noted not in good repair
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Chlorine sanitizer test kit needed for dishwashing machine in the bar
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Exhaust hood and filters noted need cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls floors ceiling and ceiling vents in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
